title: Pentatherum agrostidiforme
intro: Pentaphragma agrostidiforme is a rare and endemic flowering plant species found in the tropical forests of New Caledonia, characterized by its unique foliage and vibrant yellow flowers. The health benefits of Pentaphragma agrostidiforme are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include pentaphragmin, a diterpenoid compound, as well as other phenolic and flavonoid derivatives that contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Pentaphragma agrostidiforme is prepared as a decoction or infusion, which is commonly used in New Caledonian folk medicine to treat various health conditions, and is also available in modern herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures.
